title: ALSO AVAILABLE AS PART OF THE PICADOR COLLECTION
text: ALSO AVAILABLE AS PART OF THE PICADOR COLLECTION 1 American Psycho by Bret Easton Ellis 2 Blood Meridian by Cormac McCarthy 3 A House for Mr Biswas by V.S. Naipaul 4 The Line of Beauty by Alan Hollinghurst 5 A Little Life by Hanya Yanagihara 6 A Manual For Cleaning Women by Lucia Berlin 7 The Man Who Mistook His Wife for a Hat by Oliver Sacks 8 Middle Passage by Charles Johnson 9 Red Dust Road by Jackie Kay 10 Room by Emma Donoghue 11 So You’ve Been Publicly Shamed by Jon Ronson 12 Station Eleven by Emily St. John Mandel 13 White Noise by Don DeLillo 14 The Complete Unreliable Memoirs Vol. 1 by Clive James 15 The Complete Unreliable Memoirs Vol. 2 by Clive James 16 Cultural Amnesia by Clive James 17 Nevada by Imogen Binnie 18 At the Bottom of the River by Jamaica Kincaid 19 Annie John by Jamaica Kincaid 20 Lucy by Jamaica Kincaid 21 An Autobiography of My Mother by Jamaica Kincaid 22 Among Flowers by Jamaica Kincaid 23 All the Pretty Horses by Cormac McCarthy 24 The Crossing by Cormac McCarthy 25 Cities of the Plain by Cormac McCarthy 26 No Country for Old Men by Cormac McCarthy 27 The Road by Cormac McCarthy
